title: dalea onobrychis
intro: Dalea onobrychis, also known as prairie rose or butterfly pea, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have medicinal benefits in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dalea onobrychis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
